meaning: n.古犹太的禁欲,神秘主义宗派的信徒,艾赛尼派教徒
examples: To Essene practices, similar to that which has already been noticed.
Many of the Essene were great prophets of the future and were seldom wrong in their predictions.
To become an Essene there was a period of preparation and purification that extended over three years.
